title: Add custom initial balance to newly created funds

requirements.summary: Add an optional 'Initial Balance' numeric input field to the CreateFundDialog form
acceptanceCriteria: The CreateFundDialog form includes an optional 'Initial Balance' field (numeric input, defaulting to 0).
The field accepts positive numeric values including decimals.
If left empty or set to 0, fund creation behaves as before with no initial transaction.
The field is clearly labeled and placed logically within the form (e.g., after the fund name).

file_operations.description: Add an optional numeric 'Initial Balance' input field to the CreateFundDialog form using a shadcn/ui Input component. Place it after the fund name field and before the spending limit. Add form state to track the initialBalance value (defaulting to 0 or empty). Include validation to ensure only positive numeric values (including decimals) are accepted. Pass the initialBalance value to the useCreateFund mutation when the form is submitted.

requirements.summary: Update the useCreateFund mutation hook to pass the optional initialBalance value to the backend
acceptanceCriteria: The useCreateFund mutation accepts and forwards an initialBalance parameter to the backend.
After a successful fund creation with an initial balance, the funds list and balances are re-fetched and reflect the new amount.
A success toast or confirmation is shown after fund creation with the initial balance.

file_operations.description: Update the useCreateFund mutation hook to accept an optional initialBalance parameter (number | null) in its mutation variables. Pass this parameter to the backend actor.createFundWithInitialBalance() call. Ensure the mutation onSuccess callback invalidates the relevant queries ('funds', 'financialMetrics', 'financialMetricsDetailed') to trigger a re-fetch of fund balances. Update the success toast message to indicate when a fund is created with an initial balance.
